file: 1009_Kim 等 - 2024 - Continuous flow upgrading of lignin pyrolysis oils to drop-in bio-hydrocarbon fuels over noble metal.txt

experiments.description: 在间歇式反应器中，使用各种钌基催化剂（Ru/C、RuRe/C、RuRe/MZSM-5、RuRe/TiO2）对木质素油进行加氢脱氧（HDO）反应。反应条件：280°C，初始氢压20 bar，反应时间4小时。
experiments.text_snippet: The HDO reactions were carried out using the 160 ml batch reactor at 280 °C and 20 bar H2 pressure for 4 h... Fig. 3 shows the O/C (atom/atom) and H/C (atom/atom) ratios of the liquid products obtained after the HDO of lignin oils over various catalysts.

experiments.description: 在连续流滴流床反应器中，使用不同催化剂（Ru/C、Pd/C、RuRe/C）对木质素油-乙醇混合物进行加氢脱氧（HDO）反应。反应条件：350°C，100 bar，WHSV = 0.5 h⁻¹，运行时间10小时。
experiments.text_snippet: Fig. 4 shows the product distribution obtained from the HDO of a lignin oil-ethanol mixture over various catalysts at 350 °C and 10 h time-on-stream (TOS)... The HDO reactions were performed under the following reaction conditions: Temperature = 300–400 °C, Pressure =100 bar, and H2 flow rate =600 ml/min. 10 wt% ethanol-lignin-oil mixture... was used as reactants.

experiments.description: 在连续流滴流床反应器中，使用RuRe/C催化剂，系统研究反应温度（300-400°C）和重时空速（WHSV, 0.2-0.7 h⁻¹）对溶解在四氢呋喃（THF）中的木质素油加氢脱氧（HDO）性能的影响。反应压力为100 bar。
experiments.text_snippet: Table 2 shows the effect of temperature on the reaction performance, measured at fixed WHSV of 0.2 h⁻¹... Table 3 shows the effect of WHSV on the reaction performance measured at a fixed temperature of 350 °C... RuRe/C and THF were used as the catalyst and solvent, respectively. The HDO reactions were run for 6 h.

Feedstock.value: lignin pyrolysis oil (derived from kraft lignin)
Feedstock.original: lignin pyrolysis oil (derived from kraft lignin)

Catalyst loading.original: 0.5 g catalyst / 40 ml n-heptane + 1 ml lignin oil (batch)

Product.original: Deoxygenated hydrocarbon mixtures (branched cycloalkanes, C6 to C20)

Product yield.original: ~50.8 wt% organic phase, ~21.8 wt% water phase (Ru/C, continuous flow, THF)

Catalyst stability.original: Catalyst deactivation observed (>50% activity loss after 16 h TOS) due to carbon deposition and metal sintering

experiments.experiment_description: 在间歇式反应器中，使用各种钌基催化剂（Ru/C、RuRe/C、RuRe/MZSM-5、RuRe/TiO2）对木质素油进行加氢脱氧（HDO）反应。反应条件：280°C，初始氢压20 bar，反应时间4小时。
experiments.text_snippet: The HDO reactions were carried out using the 160 ml batch reactor at 280 °C and 20 bar H2 pressure for 4 h... Fig. 3 shows the O/C (atom/atom) and H/C (atom/atom) ratios of the liquid products obtained after the HDO of lignin oils over various catalysts.

Product yield.original: Organic phase oil yield: ~50.8 wt% (Ru/C), ~33.4 wt% (RuRe/C), ~6.9 wt% (Pd/C) with THF solvent

Catalyst stability.original: Catalyst deactivation observed after 16 h time-on-stream due to carbon deposition and metal sintering

experiments.experiment_description: 在连续流滴流床反应器中，使用不同催化剂（Ru/C、Pd/C、RuRe/C）对木质素油-乙醇混合物进行加氢脱氧（HDO）反应。反应条件：350°C，100 bar，WHSV = 0.5 h⁻¹，运行时间10小时。
experiments.text_snippet: Fig. 4 shows the product distribution obtained from the HDO of a lignin oil-ethanol mixture over various catalysts at 350 °C and 10 h time-on-stream (TOS)... The HDO reactions were performed under the following reaction conditions: Temperature = 300–400 °C, Pressure =100 bar, and H2 flow rate =600 m...

Catalyst composition.original: 4 wt% Ru and 3.64 wt% Re on activated carbon

Catalyst stability.original: Catalyst lost ~50% of initial activity after 16 h time-on-stream due to carbon deposition
